nasb.text: Whom have you reproached and blasphemed? And against whom have you raised your voice And haughtily lifted up your eyes? Against the Holy One of Israel!

esv.text: “‘Whom have you mocked and reviled? Against whom have you raised your voice and lifted your eyes to the heights? Against the Holy One of Israel!

cnv.text: 你辱罵誰、褻瀆誰？ 你揚起聲音， 又高舉眼目，要攻擊誰？ 就是攻擊以色列的聖者。

ccb.text: “‘你在侮辱、亵渎谁呢？ 你不放在眼里、高声骂的是谁呢？ 是以色列的圣者！

csbs.text: 你辱骂谁、亵渎谁呢？ 你扬起声音、高举眼目针对的是谁呢？ 是针对以色列的圣者！
